TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang nakahara ga niya mki sku Nanto Keng atu Nin'ay go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 284 buwan, 865 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 89% kyan ku 774 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 11% kyan ku 91 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Setik 73%, Tayan 11%, Bunun 2%, Amis 2%, Paywan 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na nakahara hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na nakahara hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na nakahara hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na nakahara hya' ga llyung. tay 'llaw na nakahara hya' ga mb'ala. tay 'zil na nakahara hya' ga gluban. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ nakaħara ɣa nija mki s~ɕku nanto keŋ atu ninʔaj ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, s~ɕetik **%, tajan **%, βunun *%, amis~ɕ *%, pajwan *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na nakaħara ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na nakaħara ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na nakaħara ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na nakaħara ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔllaw na nakaħara ħjaʔ ɣa mβʔala. taj ʔzil na nakaħara ħjaʔ ɣa ɣluβan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang nakahara ga niya mki sku Nanto Keng atu Nin'ay go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 284 buwan, 865 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 89% kyan ku 774 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 11% kyan ku 91 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Setik 73%, Tayan 11%, Bunun 2%, Amis 2%, Paywan 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na nakahara hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na nakahara hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na nakahara hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na nakahara hya' ga llyung. tay 'llaw na nakahara hya' ga mb'ala. tay 'zil na nakahara hya' ga gluban. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ nakaħara ɣa nija mki s~ɕku nanto keŋ atu ninʔaj ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, s~ɕetik **%, tajan **%, βunun *%, amis~ɕ *%, pajwan *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na nakaħara ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na nakaħara ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na nakaħara ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na nakaħara ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔllaw na nakaħara ħjaʔ ɣa mβʔala. taj ʔzil na nakaħara ħjaʔ ɣa ɣluβan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
